message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>
                  To gain knowledge about the role of young children attending daycare in the SARS-CoV-2 epidemic, a random sample of children (n=84) aged between 6 and 30 months attending daycare in Belgium was studied shortly after the start of the epidemic (February 29
                  <jats:sup>th</jats:sup>
                  ) and before the lockdown (March 18
                  <jats:sup>th</jats:sup>
                  ). No asymptomatic carriage of SARS-CoV-2 was detected, whereas common cold symptoms were common (51.2%).
                </jats:p>
title: No SARS-CoV-2 carriage observed in children attending daycare centers during the first weeks of the epidemic in Belgium
